text.title: refusal-field-strict-schema Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for refusal-field-strict-schema as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Detecting refusals by string-matching the raw response text for "I cannot" / "Sorry".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Locale- and model-dependent, breaks on every model upgrade, indistinguishable from legitimate content containing those words.
